message:
fix(cli): repair 113 Option<Commands> pattern matches + add evidence ledger widget and coalesce stress tests

- Fix CLI test compilation: update 107 `match cli.command` arms and 6
  assert patterns to handle Option<Commands> type change (br-3hkkd)
- Add EvidenceLedgerWidget to TUI: tabular display of evidence ledger
  entries with color-coded status (5 widget tests)
- Add 7 evidence wiring integration tests including JSONL roundtrip and
  multi-decision-point verification (br-3hkkd B.3)
- Add 7 coalesce stress tests: 50-thread same-key, 50 distinct keys,
  100 mixed threads, 1000 sequential rapid-fire, isomorphism proof,
  shard distribution benefit, per-key correctness (br-36tr5 E.2)
- Add coalesce benchmark suite (5 scenarios with criterion)
- Fix reserved keyword `gen` → `value` in tui_widgets.rs
- Close beads: br-3hkkd (B.3), br-3nr5u (Track B), br-36tr5 (E.2),
  br-nhowr (Track E)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,16 +37,27 @@ indexmap.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
 
 [features]
-default = ["hybrid"]
+default = ["hybrid", "s3fifo"]
 # Enable hybrid search (lexical + semantic)
 hybrid = ["mcp-agent-mail-search-core/hybrid", "dep:half"]
 # Enable loom model-checking tests (run with `cargo test --features loom-tests`)
 loom-tests = []
+# Use S3-FIFO eviction in ReadCache (replaces IndexMap LRU)
+s3fifo = []
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+criterion.workspace = true
 loom.workspace = true
 proptest.workspace = true
 tempfile.workspace = true
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "cache_bench"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "coalesce_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [lints]
 workspace = true
